{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220739504F14B5F745A91EF4943A"}"},"total":129},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7485805021699818265","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"作者写非常不错，但是情节跳跃太多。应该加入更多的人情，人文人物情感等元素。包括伦理，社会阵营等阶层争议观点。并且细化到个人利益的元素，这些东西可以包含哲学和思想的冲突。你的情节已经铺开了，那么开拓宇宙。改造星球等等都可以有，，，，，，"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742933226,"group_id":"7474973818792987672","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"网络里流浪的农民 想找块可以播种希望的土地😀","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6Py4MFg1+tmE3vIDtLChvpNejhoSLGAzxJaAZIAaF8x","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"2875944616075735","user_name":"老了的孩子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2875944616075735","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7474973818792987672","book_info":{"abstract":"江州职业技术大学。
陈斌意外获得超级科技图录。
只要消耗震撼点，就可以从图录中兑换来自未来的各种顶尖高科技产品！
为了获取震撼点，陈斌开始了超级曝光。
大学生机器人大赛，陈斌携仿真机械狗登场，直接改变机器人领域格局，全场震撼！
表彰大会上，陈斌脚踏离子推进浮空板，从天而降！
这只是个开始，有了足够的震撼点，陈斌开始陆续拿出顶尖黑科技产品。
可控核聚变反应炉，超武装机甲，延寿基因药剂，斥力装甲……
远在大洋彼岸的鹰酱彻底慌了神，必须要采取措施，否则他们的地位将不复存在！
也在这个时候，陈斌驾驶着星球战舰降临地星：“我就搞点小发明，鹰酱你慌什么？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/0a81708c70f7c0e22c2d309771430b16","author":"玲人利语","author_id":"","book_id":"7474973818792987672","book_name":"还在蓝星，兔子升级星际文明了？","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283068","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1281人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":854,"name":"黑科技","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=854&name=黑科技&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7474973888888504856","read_count":"1281","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"330652"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"158","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,系统,黑科技","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/82e618463ea3f44642193a37c37904db~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779320390&x-signature=HnmdQKo3eyefNs8vr6fFgJ8l3hA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1720117218257027","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"173"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220739504F14B5F745A91EF4943A"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":19858,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39528,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":5510},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_
